qa_pairs.question: What is the version of the `Test::Output` extension?
Could you tell me the version number for `XML::Twig`?
What is the version of the `Time::HiRes` extension?
What is the keyword associated with this set of tools?
qa_pairs.answer: The keyword associated with this set of tools is `tools`.

qa_pairs.question: Name a few Perl extensions related to testing listed here.
qa_pairs.answer: Some Perl extensions related to testing include `Test-1.26`, `Test::ClassAPI-1.07`, `Test::Deep-1.130`, `Test::Differences-0.67`, `Test::Exception-0.43`, `Test::Fatal-0.014`, `Test::Harness-3.42`, `Test::LeakTrace-0.16`, `Test::More-1.302172`, `Test::Most-0.35`, `Test::NoWarnings-1.04`, `Test::Output-1.031`, `Test::Pod-1.52`, `Test::Requires-0.10`, `Test::RequiresInternet-0.05`, `Test::Simple-1.302172`, `Test::Version-2.09`, `Test::Warn-0.36`, and `Test::Warnings-0.029`.

qa_pairs.question: What version of `YAML::Tiny` is provided?
qa_pairs.answer: The `YAML::Tiny` extension is provided in version `1.73`.

qa_pairs.question: What are some of the `Text::` related extensions available?
Can you list some `XML::` related extensions and their versions?
qa_pairs.answer: Certainly, some `XML::` related extensions include `XML::Bare-0.53`, `XML::DOM-1.46`, `XML::Filter::BufferText-1.01`, `XML::NamespaceSupport-1.12`, `XML::Parser-2.46`, `XML::RegExp-0.04`, `XML::SAX-1.02`, `XML::SAX::Base-1.09`, `XML::SAX::Writer-0.57`, `XML::Simple-2.25`, `XML::Tiny-2.07`, `XML::Twig-3.52`, and `XML::XPath-1.44`.

qa_pairs.question: What version of `Thread::Queue` is listed?
qa_pairs.answer: The `Thread::Queue` extension is listed as version `3.13`.
